case_title: NASH, KATHERINE VS POLLOCK, JAMES MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRENLAR INVESTMENTS INC.DBA FRANK HOWARD ALLEN REA
